language_rule: 中文优先，默认全局中文

Alpha.question: 是否投入资源用真实历史行情、交易成本和样本外窗口验证 Alpha 动量筛选、风险评分和交易前门禁是否优于简单基线，同时保持零实盘执行。
Alpha.recommendation: A: fund historical-data validation before any stronger delivery claim
Alpha.option_a: 投入真实历史数据、walk-forward、成本/滑点和买入持有基线验证。
Alpha.option_b: 保持研究/模拟用途，所有生产和实盘相关声明继续 blocked。
Alpha.option_c: 暂停 Alpha 交付声称，只保留代码与治理同步。
Alpha.effort: P1; model_owner + risk_owner review plus data preparation
Alpha.resource: historical market data, cost/slippage assumptions, review time
Alpha.benefit: 判断当前信号和风险门禁是否有样本外价值，而不把实现一致性误认为有效性。
Alpha.risks: future leakage, overfitting, data/vendor limits, transaction-cost understatement
Alpha.evidence: versioned market snapshot, baseline metrics, OOS report, sensitivity table
Alpha.no_decision: Alpha remains FAILED for operational/delivery readiness and cannot support production claims.

EEI.question: 是否继续投入 24 小时 operator soak 和人工黄金集，验证 EEI 实体解析、关系抽取、证据覆盖与撤回能力。
EEI.recommendation: A: complete 24h soak and gold-set validation before publishing stronger claims
EEI.option_a: 补齐人工裁决黄金集、24h soak、来源撤回和冲突演练。
EEI.option_b: 保持 partial，仅允许内部研究和人工复核。
EEI.option_c: 暂停关系发布相关交付声明。
EEI.effort: P2; product/data/risk owners plus operator time
EEI.resource: official-source access, labeled gold set, soak runner time
EEI.benefit: 降低未经证实企业关系被发布为事实的风险。
EEI.risks: source license limits, stale relationships, false relation assertions
EEI.evidence: gold-set labels, precision/recall, source coverage, soak manifest
EEI.no_decision: EEI remains FAILED/PARTIAL and publication readiness stays blocked.

EVA_OS.question: 是否投入参数来源、样本外、成本和报告 claim-to-evidence 验证，证明 EVA_OS 研究结论可复现且不夸大。
EVA_OS.recommendation: A: fund parameter review and OOS evidence hardening
EVA_OS.option_a: 完成剩余参数来源、OOS、成本压力和报告主张抽检。
EVA_OS.option_b: 保持研究假设，不提升 readiness。
EVA_OS.option_c: 暂停对外报告交付声明。
EVA_OS.resource: historical data, experiment logs, report evidence manifest
EVA_OS.benefit: 把实验实现与真实可复现证据分开，避免选择性报告。
EVA_OS.risks: parameter instability, cost omissions, cherry-picked reports
EVA_OS.evidence: OOS protocol, rerun logs, claim ledger, sensitivity results
EVA_OS.no_decision: EVA_OS remains FAILED for operational and delivery readiness.

FIFA.question: 是否补齐授权赛前赔率快照、概率校准和报告事实复核，且继续保证 stake/executable amount 为 0。
FIFA.recommendation: A: validate historical odds snapshots under zero-stake boundary
FIFA.option_a: 建立赛前快照数据合同、Brier/log loss/ECE 校准和事实抽检。
FIFA.option_b: 维持研究用途，不声称预测有效。
FIFA.option_c: 暂停 FIFA 概率/价值报告交付。
FIFA.resource: authorized odds snapshots, match results, report audit samples
FIFA.benefit: 判断概率和报告是否比市场/简单基线更有用，同时避免下注风险。
FIFA.risks: post-event leakage, unauthorized data, betting misuse
FIFA.evidence: timestamped odds data, calibration report, zero-stake gate evidence
FIFA.no_decision: FIFA remains UNVERIFIED and cannot support value/recommendation claims.

OpMe_System.question: 是否由工程/安全/运营责任人投入专家裁决案例，验证 OpMe 诊断、严重度、LLM 路由和危险漏报失效安全。
OpMe_System.recommendation: A: fund expert-labeled safety validation before operational use
OpMe_System.option_a: 完成专家双评、危险漏报专项集、回退演练和报告可执行性复核。
OpMe_System.option_b: 保持内部辅助研究，所有现场/生产建议需工程师复核。
OpMe_System.option_c: 暂停高风险诊断和操作建议交付。
OpMe_System.effort: P0; engineering, safety, operations owners required
OpMe_System.resource: de-identified industrial cases, expert adjudication, safety review time
OpMe_System.benefit: 降低危险故障漏报和无依据操作建议风险。
OpMe_System.risks: unsafe advice, missing expert labels, provider outage,现场适用性不足
OpMe_System.evidence: expert labels, severity-weighted errors, dangerous false-negative rate, fallback logs
OpMe_System.no_decision: OpMe_System remains UNVERIFIED and must not be treated as production safety tooling.

OpenAIDatabase.question: 是否投入去标识黄金集和隐私攻击测试，验证记忆提取、脱敏、冲突/去重、检索和建议效用不会泄漏高风险秘密。
OpenAIDatabase.recommendation: A: fund privacy-first gold-set validation before persistent memory write claims
OpenAIDatabase.option_a: 建立同意样本/高保真合成集、秘密泄漏测试、检索和建议盲评。
OpenAIDatabase.option_b: 保留本地只读研究，写入前继续人工确认。
OpenAIDatabase.option_c: 暂停持久记忆和自动建议交付。
OpenAIDatabase.effort: P0; privacy and product owner review
OpenAIDatabase.resource: consented/de-identified exports, adversarial secret set, evaluator time
OpenAIDatabase.benefit: 验证系统有用且不会把私密内容错误持久化或泄漏。
OpenAIDatabase.risks: PII/secret leakage, stale memory, false user facts
OpenAIDatabase.evidence: gold labels, leakage-rate report, retrieval metrics, human write approval logs
OpenAIDatabase.no_decision: OpenAIDatabase remains FAILED for delivery readiness and cannot claim safe memory operation.

PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.question: 是否投入多市场、OOS、成本和多重检验控制，验证 PFI 策略族不是数据挖掘赢家。
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.recommendation: A: validate OOS and multiple-testing controls before ranking strategy claims
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.option_a: 执行预注册、walk-forward、FDR/Reality Check、快筛-精确一致性和成本压力。
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.option_b: 保持模拟研究，不提升策略有效性状态。
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.resource: multi-market snapshots, compute time, multiple-testing protocol
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.benefit: 区分真实稳健表现与大规模搜索偏差。
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.risks: data mining, survivor bias, underestimated costs, resource blowups
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.evidence: pre-registration, OOS metrics, corrected significance, sensitivity results
PFI_BIG_DATA_SIMULATOR.no_decision: PFI remains UNVERIFIED and cannot support strategy approval.

Serenity-Alipay.question: 是否投入历史基金快照、基准、OOS、消融和敏感性，验证评分权重、等级阈值、硬门禁和 Top5 衰减是否有稳定区分力。
Serenity-Alipay.recommendation: A: fund empirical calibration and OOS validation; implementation is already machine-verified
Serenity-Alipay.option_a: 补齐基金快照、基准、OOS、消融和参数敏感性证据。
Serenity-Alipay.option_b: 保持规则实现已核对，不宣称策略有效。
Serenity-Alipay.option_c: 暂停基金评分交付声明。
Serenity-Alipay.effort: P1; model/risk owner plus data preparation
Serenity-Alipay.resource: historical fund snapshots, benchmark series, calibration protocol
Serenity-Alipay.benefit: 判断当前权重/阈值/门禁是否有风险控制和排序价值。
Serenity-Alipay.risks: survivorship bias, overfitting, stale fund availability, investment misuse
Serenity-Alipay.evidence: versioned snapshots, OOS metrics, ablation, sensitivity and gate-value report
Serenity-Alipay.no_decision: Serenity remains UNVERIFIED for empirical/delivery readiness despite machine-verified implementation.

whkmSalary.question: 是否由工资、法务/政策和产品责任人提供权威政策、法域、生效日期、税务和舍入证据，验证 whkmSalary 可用于真实算薪。
whkmSalary.recommendation: A: fund policy and payroll reconciliation evidence before any production payroll use
whkmSalary.option_a: 补齐政策来源、司法辖区、生效日期、税务、舍入和匿名历史对账。
whkmSalary.option_b: 保持演示/研究用途，禁止生产算薪。
whkmSalary.option_c: 暂停工资计算交付声明。
whkmSalary.effort: P0; payroll + legal/policy + product owner sign-off
whkmSalary.resource: authoritative policy docs, approved payroll examples, reviewer time
whkmSalary.benefit: 避免把未经授权或过期规则用于工资、税费和绩效结算。
whkmSalary.risks: legal error, payroll under/overpayment, PII leakage, unfair impact
whkmSalary.evidence: policy refs, jurisdiction/effective-date matrix, reconciliation results, approval memo
whkmSalary.no_decision: whkmSalary remains FAILED and must not be used for production payroll.

arxiv-daily-push.question: 是否继续执行 S1-07，生成 B1/arXiv 的高信息密度中文讲解教学邮件，而不是启动生产 trial。
arxiv-daily-push.recommendation: A: implement S1-07 B1/arXiv text teaching email before any production enablement
arxiv-daily-push.option_a: 继续 S1-07，完成 B1/arXiv 中文讲解报告、邮件文本/HTML 和审计工件。
arxiv-daily-push.option_b: 暂停在 S1-06，等待人工重审文本讲解标准。
arxiv-daily-push.option_c: 恢复旧 Phase 12 media path；不推荐，且会偏离 V5 Stage 1。
arxiv-daily-push.resource: local tests only; no real SMTP, no Release upload, no video generation
arxiv-daily-push.benefit: 把 arXiv 输出从日报摘要提升为可长期运行的讲解教学邮件。
arxiv-daily-push.risks: shallow digest quality, unsupported claims, old media path leakage, premature production enablement
arxiv-daily-push.evidence: B1 report artifact, email preview, claim evidence, focused tests, governance records
arxiv-daily-push.no_decision: arxiv-daily-push remains at S1-06 and cannot reach ARXIV_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.

S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.question: 是否继续执行 S1-08，补齐本地 tick、watchdog、backup、restore、runtime audit 和 scheduler install/uninstall 恢复控制。
S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.recommendation: A: implement S1-08 local runtime recovery controls before migration packaging
S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.option_a: 继续 S1-08，完成本地运行、恢复、备份和调度控制的低资源代码与证据。
S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.option_b: 暂停在 S1-07，只保留 B1 报告/邮件预览，不进入本地运行恢复门禁。
S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.option_c: 跳过 S1-08 直接迁移；不推荐，因为会缺少恢复和调度证据。

S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.evidence: tick/watchdog reports, backup/restore fixtures, scheduler dry-run evidence, focused tests, governance records
S1-08-LOCAL_RUNTIME_RECOVERY-001.no_decision: arxiv-daily-push remains at S1-07 and cannot reach ARXIV_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.

S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.question: 是否继续执行 S1-09，产出新机器迁移包、低资源运行证据和长期运行交接清单。
S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.recommendation: A: implement S1-09 migration package before historical previews and live-day evidence
S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.option_a: 继续 S1-09，完成新机器迁移清单、低资源 smoke 证据、恢复路径和运行交接材料。
S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.option_b: 暂停在 S1-08，只保留本地运行恢复控制，不进入迁移准备。

S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.risks: migration checklist gaps, hidden local-state dependency, resource pressure, premature production enablement
S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.evidence: migration package, low-resource smoke evidence, restore checklist, focused tests, governance records
S1-09-MIGRATION_PACKAGE-001.no_decision: arxiv-daily-push remains at S1-08 and cannot reach ARXIV_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.

S1-10-POST_MIGRATION_BOOTSTRAP-001.question: 是否继续执行 S1-10，在迁移后目标环境验证 runtime 边界，再进入历史预览和 live-day 证据。
S1-10-POST_MIGRATION_BOOTSTRAP-001.recommendation: A: run post-migration bootstrap before historical previews and live-day evidence

S1-10-POST_MIGRATION_BOOTSTRAP-001.resource: target runner smoke tests only; no production schedule install, no real SMTP, no Release upload, no large replay

S1-10-POST_MIGRATION_BOOTSTRAP-001.no_decision: arxiv-daily-push remains at S1-09 and cannot reach ARXIV_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.

ADP-S1P5T04-SYDNEY-SERVICE-DATE-039.benefit: 确保每日邮件和 daily artifacts 按 Australia/Sydney 人类服务日期生成，而不是 UTC 截日。
ADP-S1P5T04-SYDNEY-SERVICE-DATE-039.risks: PR CI failure, accidental duplicate test email, premature production schedule enablement
ADP-S1P5T04-SYDNEY-SERVICE-DATE-039.evidence: workflow tests, GitHub PR CI, post-merge controlled test10 scheduled-execution artifact
ADP-S1P5T04-SYDNEY-SERVICE-DATE-039.no_decision: Stage 1 arXiv acceptance remains recorded, but controlled email cannot be accepted as daily-service evidence.

ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.question: 是否现在从 main 触发一次受控 Gmail SMTP test10，以验证悉尼服务日期、中文教学邮件和云端 workflow。
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.recommendation: A: trigger controlled test10 from main; keep production disabled
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.option_a: 从 main 触发一次 manual B1 text SMTP test10，验证邮件标题日期、中文正文和 artifact。
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.option_b: 继续等待；安全但 Stage 1 邮件前台和日期修复缺少 post-merge 真实邮件证据。
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.option_c: 直接启用 production schedule；禁止，因为 test10 尚未证明 post-merge 邮件路径。
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.effort: P1; one GitHub Actions manual run plus artifact verification
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.resource: GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest and one Gmail SMTP test email; no local background production process
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.benefit: 把已合并的悉尼服务日期修复、中文教学型邮件前台、全 arXiv daily input、候选队列摘要和 Gmail SMTP 云端发送闭环绑定到一次真实 post-merge 证据。
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.risks: 误选非 main 分支、重复发送测试邮件、过早启用 production schedule
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.evidence: manual test10 run id, scheduled-execution artifact, SMTP sent state, Sydney-date email subject, production scheduled job skipped or disabled
ADP-S1P5T04-POST-MERGE-TEST10-040.no_decision: Stage 1 arXiv acceptance remains recorded, but post-merge test10 proof remains incomplete.

ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.question: 是否在 test10 已通过后单独启用每日生产定时。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.recommendation: A: keep production schedule disabled until a separate owner-approved enablement run
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.option_a: 保持 production schedule disabled，先确认你确实要每天自动发送。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.option_b: 进入邮件模板质量优化，不改变 production flags。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.option_c: 启用生产定时；只允许在你明确批准并核对 GitHub variables/secrets 后执行。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.effort: P1; explicit owner decision plus GitHub variable/secret verification
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.resource: GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest and Gmail SMTP; no local Mac background process
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.benefit: 把 Stage 1 已验收和真正每日自动发送分开，避免未授权生产邮件。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.risks: 误启用 ADP_PRODUCTION_ENABLED 或 ADP_SCHEDULED_RUN_ENABLED 会造成每日真实发送；错误 SMTP/Release flags 会破坏 fail-closed 边界。
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.evidence: owner approval, repository variable state, scheduled workflow run evidence, SMTP sent artifact, no secret/body logging
ADP-S1P5T04-PRODUCTION-SCHEDULE-OWNER-DE.no_decision: Stage 1 remains accepted, but production schedule stays disabled and no daily automatic send occurs.

ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.question: 是否按本机 Mac + Codex/local runner 作为 Stage 1 生产运行策略，并准备 2026-06-30 新电脑迁移。
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.recommendation: A: keep GitHub cloud schedule disabled and finish local runner migration prep
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.option_a: 使用本机 Codex/local runner，每日状态写入本地 state dir，GitHub 只做代码、PR/CI、证据、状态和备份。
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.option_b: 暂停自动运行，仅保留手动 smoke test；安全但不会自动补每日邮件。
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.option_c: 重新启用 GitHub cloud scheduled production；当前不采用，除非 owner 另开明确任务。
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.effort: P1; local CLI, launchd package draft, state persistence, migration runbook, smoke evidence
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.resource: current Mac until 2026-06-30, then new Mac; Gmail SMTP only through local environment or Keychain-backed setup
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.benefit: 把用户确认的低复杂度部署策略落到可复制、可验证、可迁移的本地运行路径。
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.risks: 本地环境变量缺失、launchd 误安装、旧电脑和新电脑 state 不一致、GitHub cloud schedule 被误当生产 runner
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.evidence: local-runner tests, local preflight report, queue/ledger/email preview state files, launchd package draft, migration runbook
ADP-S1P5T05-LOCAL-PRODUCTION-AND-MIGRATI.no_decision: Stage 1 remains accepted, but daily local production is not ready for owner-controlled smoke and migration.

S2P1T01.question: 是否开始 Stage 2 的第一个 source promotion：bioRxiv 与 medRxiv。
S2P1T01.recommendation: A: start S2P1T01 after S1 local runner migration prep
S2P1T01.option_a: 开始 bioRxiv/medRxiv source adapter 和 shadow-mode gate，不影响现有 arXiv 本地生产路径。
S2P1T01.option_b: 先只做 Stage 1 本地 smoke，不进入新来源；风险更低但 Stage 2 不推进。
S2P1T01.option_c: 越过 source gate 直接把新来源放进正式邮件；禁止。
S2P1T01.effort: P1/P2; source adapter, fixtures, 30-day replay plan, 48h shadow contract, arXiv no-regression tests
S2P1T01.resource: local development and GitHub PR/CI evidence; no GitHub cloud scheduled production runner
S2P1T01.benefit: 在保持 arXiv 稳定运行的前提下，逐步把 Stage 2 扩展到生命科学与医学预印本。
S2P1T01.risks: 源身份混淆、重复 canonical paper、许可/全文越权、shadow 数据影响正式 arXiv 邮件
S2P1T01.evidence: source adapter tests, source registry gate, fixture parse, replay/shadow reports, arXiv no-regression evidence
S2P1T01.no_decision: Stage 1 local production prep remains complete, but Stage 2 does not begin.

ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.question: 是否继续优化 arXiv 邮件前台模板，但不阻塞已通过的 Stage 1 arXiv 生产验收。
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.recommendation: A: defer template redesign until Stage 1 acceptance evidence is synchronized
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.option_a: 保留当前可运行邮件模板，先完成 Stage 1 accepted 证据同步和生产开关核对。
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.option_b: 进入邮件前台模板优化，按人类刻度、中文讲解密度和可操作性重做布局。
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.option_c: 跳过模板优化直接扩大到 Stage 2；不推荐，因为用户已明确不满意前台体验。
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.resource: local rendering tests and one controlled manual email if template changes
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.benefit: 把已可运行的 arXiv 交付继续提升为高信息密度教学邮件，而不把模板问题误判为 Stage 1 acceptance blocker。
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.risks: 邮件可读性不足、信息密度低、过早进入 Stage 2、误开启生产定时
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.evidence: email render tests, scheduled_execution regression, controlled manual SMTP evidence if frontstage changes
ADP-PHASE12-EMAIL-HUMAN-FORMAT-036.no_decision: Stage 1 arXiv acceptance remains recorded, but human-facing email quality stays below owner preference.
